steps.title: State the study objective
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize an objective of the GREEN SURGE study. The notes state the objective directly: a primary aim was to determine the benefits of urban natural areas in European cities.

steps.title: Reject scope and park details
steps.content: Choice A describes duration and location. Choice B says the study examined many types of UNAs but does not state the objective. Choice D focuses on large urban parks and biodiversity. The sentence centered on determining UNA benefits states the aim. The answer is C.
